section_title: Penalty for non-compliance by auditor with section 213 and 215.- If any auditors report is made or any
content:
219. Penalty for non-compliance by auditor with section 213 and 215.- If any auditors report is made or any
document of the company is signed or authenticated otherwise than in conformity with the requirement of sections 231 215,
the auditor concerned, and any other person, who signs the report or signs or authenticates the document, shall if the default
is wilful, be punishable with fine which may extend to one thousand taka.
